task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Aircraft Model 'Nile Scout 200' with the correct category, sub-category, and series.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Add aircraft model' form being filled or a success message. Look for Model Name: 'Nile Scout 200', Category: 'ROTORCRAFT', Sub-category: 'Multirotor', and Series: '2024.1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Aircraft Model specifications and Type Certificate linkage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Aircraft Model form showing Mass: '1200', Max certified takeoff weight: '1.500', Max speed: '15', and the Type Certificate dropdown selecting the existing certificate (held by Agro Products Inc.).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a 'Complete' Aircraft Assembly for the new model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Add aircraft assembly' form or success message. The selected Aircraft model should be 'Nile Scout 200' and the Status dropdown must be set to 'Complete'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Aircraft 'NS-001' with 'Active' status and correct flight controller ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Add aircraft' form or success message. Look for Name/Registration: 'NS-001', Status: 'Active', and Flight controller ID: 'NSCTRL112233'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Aircraft 'NS-001' is linked to the correct Operator, Manufacturer, and Assembly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Aircraft form showing Operator selected as 'Electric Inspection', Manufacturer selected as 'Aerobridge Drone Company', and the Aircraft assembly field pointing to the newly created assembly.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Aerobridge admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigated to http://localhost:8000/admin/.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries (like sqlite3) to create the records.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the web forms to input the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent typing or pasting values into the Django admin form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the Aerobridge Django admin interface at http://localhost:8000/admin/ (credentials: admin / adminpass123). The existing Type Certificate to be linked is held by 'Agro Products Inc.' (ID: 75f358c6-e8d3-46aa-a3de-172bdcea469d). The Operator to be selected is 'Electric Inspection' and the Manufacturer is 'Aerobridge Drone Company'.
